description: Plugin-distributed hooks for embedded-iot-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: review this Embedded & IoT Engineering deliverable against the §3 house opinions (baseline on every metric, source+date on every benchmark, no device/telemetry PII). Set EMBEDDED_IOT_ENGINEERING_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
